headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》蓄势待发
headlineEn: Obsession Tops Trending, Enola Holmes 3 on the Horizon
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，但《痴迷》热度不减，《福尔摩斯小姐3》与《达顿牧场》等本周备受关注。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but Obsession remains hot, while Enola Holmes 3 and Dutton Ranch are among this week's top trends.

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，市场静待暑期档爆发。
industryHighlights.en: No new releases this week, market awaits summer blockbusters.

industryHighlights.text: 《无职转生》动画热度持续，异世界题材受捧。
industryHighlights.en: Mushoku Tensei anime remains popular, isekai genre thrives.

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》与《气体人第一号》成今日冷门话题。
industryHighlights.en: Silo and The First Gas Man emerge as niche topics today.
